privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic OpenSIS database environment. The student record for Kenny McCormick (Grade 10, Male) is created programmatically during task setup via setup_task.sh, not sourced from real data. The target locker number is 555. Admin credentials (username: admin, password: Admin@123) are generated during OpenSIS environment initialization in setup_opensis.sh. The locker_number field is added to the students table as a custom column during setup. All verified metadata values are correct and consistent with the task requirements.
